content: agent1: working on ImageOps.exif_transpose XMP tuple fix (issue: TypeError when XMP data is a tuple). Touching src/PIL/ImageOps.py and Tests/test_imageops.py. Will avoid other unrelated changes.

agent1: done with XMP tuple fix in ImageOps.exif_transpose (src/PIL/ImageOps.py, lines ~725-736, the 'for key in ("XML:com.adobe.xmp", "xmp")' block). I unwrap tuple-wrapped XMP values before re.sub and rewrap after. Added test_exif_transpose_xmp_tuple in Tests/test_imageops.py. If your logging changes touch that same block, please rebase on top of mine to avoid clobbering.
